nasb.text: Then Amnon hated her with a very great hatred; for the hatred with which he hated her was greater than the love with which he had loved her. And Amnon said to her, “Get up, go away!”

esv.text: Then Amnon hated her with very great hatred, so that the hatred with which he hated her was greater than the love with which he had loved her. And Amnon said to her, “Get up! Go!”

cnv.text: 事後，暗嫩非常恨她；他對他瑪的恨比以前對她的愛更大，所以暗嫩對她說：“你起來！走吧！”

ccb.text: 事后暗嫩非常憎恨她玛，对她的恨比以前对她的爱还强烈。他对她玛说：“你起来走吧！”
